name: openmucf-rate-ledger
title: OpenMuCF FAIR rate ledger (curated compilation with provenance)
description: A curated compilation with provenance of the microscopic rates, validation targets, uncertainty-quantification priors, and muon-production energy costs used by OpenMuCF. Every row carries its source, physical conditions, uncertainty, and an established/contested tag. This is a provenance-tagged compilation of published values, NOT an independently evaluated nuclear-data library.

fields.name: symbol
fields.description: Unique machine key for the rate/parameter.

fields.name: value
fields.description: The numeric value in the stated unit.

fields.name: unit
fields.description: Physical unit, e.g. s^-1, percent, fraction, MeV.

fields.name: unc
fields.description: 1-sigma-style uncertainty in the same unit (0 if none quoted).

fields.name: unc_type
fields.description: Provenance of the uncertainty: stat, exp, theory, theory-spread, model, table, estimate, exact.

fields.name: conditions
fields.description: Physical state the value holds at (T, phi, F, ortho/para, c_t, field).

fields.name: validity_range
fields.description: Regime the row is valid over.

fields.name: single_source
fields.description: True if it traces to a single, never-independently-rechecked measurement.

fields.name: needs_verification
fields.description: True if the exact digit/locator is not yet pinned from the primary text.

fields.name: distribution
fields.description: Sampling distribution shape for UQ, if applicable.

fields.name: dist_lo
fields.description: Lower bound for the UQ distribution, if applicable.

fields.name: dist_hi
fields.description: Upper bound for the UQ distribution, if applicable.

fields.name: phase
fields.description: Project phase in which the row is used/added.

fields.name: target_molecule
fields.description: Target muonic molecule the row pertains to, if applicable.

resources.name: validation-targets
resources.title: Pre-registered validation targets (reproduction / consistency / independent tiers)

fields.name: unc
fields.description: Reported uncertainty on the observed value.

fields.name: tolerance
fields.description: Pre-registered pass tolerance: [a,b] absolute interval or +-N% relative.

resources.name: uq-priors
resources.title: Frozen Wave-1 uncertainty-quantification priors (Sobol / forward-UQ boxes)

fields.name: low
fields.description: Lower bound of the prior box.

fields.name: high
fields.description: Upper bound of the prior box.

fields.name: ledger_symbols
fields.description: Rate symbol(s) in rates.csv this prior maps to.

resources.name: muon-cost
resources.title: Muon-production energy-cost compilation, normalized to GeV per stopped muon

fields.name: basis_as_published
fields.description: The cost basis exactly as the source states it.

fields.name: recapture_credit_applied
fields.description: Whether a recapture/recovery credit was applied by the source.

fields.name: eta_acc_assumption
fields.description: Accelerator efficiency assumed by the source, if stated.

fields.name: value_as_published
fields.description: The published cost value in its own unit.

fields.name: normalized_GeV_per_stopped_mu
fields.description: Value re-expressed on the common GeV-per-stopped-muon basis.

fields.name: derivation
fields.description: Arithmetic taking the published value to the normalized basis.

fields.name: needs_verification
fields.description: True if the exact digit/locator is not yet pinned.

resources.name: yamashita-kino-lambda-c-T
resources.title: Digitized normalized cycle rate lambda_c(T) from Yamashita-Kino 2022 Fig. 3a (c_t=0.5, EVM-SPM-FIF band centreline)

fields.name: lambda_c_s^-1
fields.description: Normalized cycle rate lambda_c at c_t=0.5 (s^-1), pixel-traced band centreline.

fields.name: digitization_unc_rel
fields.description: Relative digitization uncertainty (pixel read + band-centre-vs-solid-line ambiguity).

fields.name: source_locator
fields.description: Exact figure/panel locator inside the source.
